name: pr-reviewer
description: Review pull requests / code changes with GitHub Copilot, narrated by an animated cartoon character.

commands.title: PR Reviewer: Review Current PR / Branch Diff
PR Reviewer: Clear All Review Decorations
PR Reviewer: Clear Custom Idle Sprite
PR Reviewer: Clear Custom Work Sprite

prReviewer.customIdleSprite.description: Path to a custom sprite sheet PNG for idle animation. Use command 'PR Reviewer: Browse Idle Sprite...' to select a file. Leave empty to use the bundled character.

prReviewer.idleSpriteRows.description: Number of rows in the idle sprite sheet.

prReviewer.idleSpriteCols.description: Number of columns in the idle sprite sheet.

prReviewer.customWorkSprite.description: Path to a custom sprite sheet PNG for working animation. Use command 'PR Reviewer: Browse Work Sprite...' to select a file. Leave empty to use the bundled character.

prReviewer.workSpriteRows.description: Number of rows in the work sprite sheet.

prReviewer.workSpriteCols.description: Number of columns in the work sprite sheet.

prReviewer.debugOutput.description: Enable debug output in the 'PR Reviewer' output channel. Useful for troubleshooting.

prReviewer.fontSize.description: Font size in pixels for the PR Reviewer panel. Set to 0 to use VS Code's default font size. Valid range: 8-32px.

prReviewer.fontFamily.description: Custom font family for the PR Reviewer panel. Leave empty to use VS Code's default font.

apiBaseUrl.description: Custom API base URL (e.g., https://github.mycompany.com/api/v3). If omitted, defaults to https://{host}/api/v3 for GitHub Enterprise.

prReviewer.githubPATs.markdownDescription:
Map of GitHub host URLs to Personal Access Tokens (PATs).

**Simple format:** `{ "github.com": "ghp_xxxx" }`

**With custom API URL:** `{ "github.mycompany.com": { "pat": "ghp_xxxx", "apiBaseUrl": "https://github.mycompany.com/api/v3" } }`

When a PAT is configured, it will be used instead of VS Code's built-in GitHub authentication.

**Required PAT permissions:** `repo` scope (for private repositories) or `public_repo` scope (for public repositories only).
